title: galium spurium subsp. infestum
intro: Galium spurium subsp. infestum, also known as prickly bedstraw, is a subspecies of the Galium spurium plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihistamine effects. The health benefits of Galium spurium subsp. infestum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce itching and swelling, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
